embeds.title: I Read Chinese Reviews to Understand Slay the Spire 2’s Backlash
embeds.description:
Slay the Spire 2 got review bombed by players from China. I am at least bilingual, so I decided to read some Steam reviews, and also went onto Bilibili to see what's the whole issue about. The reviews are recorded as of 24/04/2026.

Links:
PC Gamer interview with Casey Yano: https://youtu.be/FlmDB5Q

<@212031841786527764> Apologies if this isn't the correct place to put this, but I had a suggestion on the new player handbook:

For the awakener tierlist, would it be possible to also split it by realm? In my head it would be tiers still as rows, and then the realms as columns. Since I still don't fully know which awakener belongs where, it helps to have an easier glance if I'm looking for information on a specific realm (e.g. "I need to find a good DPS for my Caro team.") first of all, it is already organized by realm and then alphabetical

if your "caro team" doesn't have a dps, you don't have a team
you just have a collection of caro units
